meta.title: The Future of Tokenized Funds: How Institutional Asset Managers Scale Onchain

transcript:
Shukyee Ma: Hi everyone, I'm Shukyee Ma. I'm the Chief Strategy Officer at Plume, and today I'm with Maredith.

Maredith Hannon: And hi everyone, I'm Maredith Hannon. I lead business development for the digital assets business at WisdomTree. So thanks for having me.

Shukyee Ma: Yeah. Today we are here to announce a very exciting news for Plume, Solana, and WisdomTree together. Plume is bringing five institutional-grade vaults to Solana, including WisdomTree's tokenized treasury and credit strategies on on Solana and Plume. So today we are here to talk about our next step and the roadmap and something about the assets and the vaults here. Maredith, do you want to introduce a little bit about WisdomTree and the assets here?

Maredith Hannon: Absolutely. Thank you so much. So, WisdomTree, for a little context, is an $140 billion global asset manager. And today we have 15 tokenized real-world asset funds that are available to both global institutional investors as well as US retail investors with very low minimums starting at a dollar. So the products span US Treasuries, like Shukyee mentioned, equities, meaning stocks, as well as high-yielding products like our private credit fund. So we're absolutely thrilled to be here with Solana and with Plume. And really the focus of these products is to tokenize real-world assets and bring them onchain. But not just issue these funds, but also really have utility, which is what these vaults provide. So this new utility of these funds is really powerful, and this is a great example of what tokenization can bring and do compared to the traditional markets of, um, in these new asset classes and these new products. So would love to learn more about the vault.

Shukyee Ma: Yeah, of course. You know, Solana has community liquidity and of course, you know, the 24/7 trading DeFi ecosystem. That's why we're so excited to bring the vaults together on Solana. With the vaults, actually the Solana users can access to 24/7 real-time redemption and trading, and we allows it to have the lending DeFi ecosystem composability on Solana. And most important thing, we have the verifiable real cash-flowing assets on Solana. And for every users, the user experience is going to be very simple. You deposits the stablecoins that you select into the vaults, and in return you are getting the yield-accruing token. By holding that token, you can get the yields from WisdomTree. So in general, this is, you know, the partnership in three ways, and we are the distribution layer for the large asset issuers, and WisdomTree is the yield generation layer who brings, you know, the assets and the yields from offchain to onchain. And Solana is the execution layer with all the liquidity service. So we're very, very excited to talk about this, and we actually want to know like what we can do next, you know, for, you know, WisdomTree and Solana together.

Maredith Hannon: And I think what's really powerful about this as well is WisdomTree, we have a multi-chain strategy. So this is a great example of that multi-chain strategy. And why we have that is really for investors and for the Solana ecosystem, uh, to really meet our investors where they are. And that's really what's crucial about this is that in the traditional markets, you need a brokerage account, you need a a specific, um, application. There's different jurisdictional considerations. While with the onchain community, we're really able to meet investors where they are, which is onchain, in their own wallets, using our wallets or through our platforms or through partner platforms. And we think that's really, really powerful and really is changing the paradigm of what traditional access to markets could look like and what financial services will look like onchain going forward. Um, and so being here at Solana's Breakpoint has been so incredibly energizing. The community is incredible. It's dynamic, it's fast-growing, and we're looking forward to doing more, uh, with the Solana ecosystem in 2026. And this is a really great start.

Shukyee Ma: Yeah. And together we are bringing real-world asset onchain with Solana, WisdomTree, and Plume. Thank you for listening.

sources.title: Plume Brings Institutional Real-World Yield to Solana With Launch of RWA Nest Vaults

Plume Brings Institutional Real-World Yield to Solana With Launch of RWA Nest Vaults[Accessibility Statement](https://www.cision.com/about/accessibility/)[Skip Navigation](#main)
# Plume Brings Institutional Real-World Yield to Solana With Launch of RWA Nest Vaults
[![Plume Network Logo (PRNewsfoto/Plume Network)]( "Plume Network Logo (PRNewsfoto/Plume Network)")](#)
## News provided by
[**Plume Network**](https://www.prnewswire.com/news/plume-network/)
Dec 05, 2025, 09:15 ET

*Nest vaults with assets from WisdomTree, Hamilton Lane, BlackOpal and issuers including Securitize and SuperState mark the beginning of a new yield economy forSolana.*
NEW YORK,Dec. 5, 2025/PRNewswire/ --[Plume](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4573545-1&h=1349188964&u=https://plume.org/&a=Plume), the leading RWA blockchain powering real-world yield, today announced the launch of five RWA Nest vaults onSolana, setting real-world yield as a new base layer for the ecosystem and marking an important first step in Plume's multichain expansion for Nest.
Launching the vaults natively onSolanagives users direct investment opportunities to institutional-grade assets from WisdomTree, Hamilton Lane, BlackOpal, and issuers including Securitize and SuperState.Solanausers can natively access onchain credit, treasuries, and short-term receivables and the ability to earn institutional-grade real-world yield.
With the launch of nBASIS, nOPAL, nWISDOM, nALPHA and nTBILL Vaults,Solana's 20+ million users can soon deposit stablecoins natively into Nest to unlock reliable, stable, real-world APY. Each deposit returns a Nest vaulttoken, a liquid, yield-bearing asset that accrues value over time and can move seamlessly acrossSolanaDeFi, from DEX liquidity pools to lending and structured products, with the ability to redeem at any point.
As part of this integration, Plume is also launching a deep partnership with[Squads Lab](https://edge.prnewswire.com/c/link/?t=0&l=en&o=4573545-1&h=2271106279&u=https://squads.xyz/&a=Squads+Lab),Solana's leading multi-sig and treasury management infrastructure provider. Plume will introduce its RWA yield pipelines across the Squads ecosystem, including a bespoke vault integrated for Altitude users and seamless RWA yield access for developers building with Grid.
*"Cryptois moving past the era of synthetic yield and into a market grounded in real economics. Stablecoins brought millions intocrypto, but yieldcoins will keep them here. This integration withSolanais the next step in building a transparent, programmable financial system at scale."*said Teddy Pornprinya, Co-Founder and CBO at Plume.
*"Plume already anchors over half of the industry's RWA activity, andSolanahas become one of the most efficient, high-throughput environments incrypto, making it a natural home for onchain credit, treasuries, and short-term receivables. Bringing our strengths together is how we unlock the next phase of onchain finan*ce".
By introducing institutional RWAs at scale, Plume is expanding theSolanaDeFiecosystem with sustainable, composable yield infrastructure that can underpin the next generation ofSolana-native financial applications.
Solanausers can instantly access boosted yield opportunities with Nest.
The Plume Nest Points Program is a rewards framework designed to turn participation into ownership. Users can earn Plume Nest Points by holding and using Nest vault tokens. The more users hold and deploy, the more they earn as part of the Season One program.
Solanausers will also soon unlock boosted yield opportunities with direct access to lending markets on Loopscale. These platform integrations allow leverage

sources.snippet:
Plume Update: Q3 2025
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/670fc97cba6a0b3f2e579538/67406fce2fbf3bd41918a4ce_Logo.png)](https://plume.org/)
[
Enter Portal
](https://portal.plume.org/)
[
All Articles
](https://plume.org/blog)# Plume Update: Q3 2025
November 5, 2025
Switch to
[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/670fc97cba6a0b3f2e579538/690a1c39a7e674e82a0fc84f_KR.avif)](https://plume.org/blog/plume-update-q3-2025-kr)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6712a2209a919629c9116dc2/690e3b2804561f7913ac7295_Plume%20Update%20-%20Q3.avif)
## Introduction & Highlights
‍**Q3 2025 marked Plume’s first full quarter since mainnet launch. It was a defining moment in our evolution from a new chain to the world’s leading network for RWAs.**
Over the[past three months](https://x.com/plumenetwork/status/1977630810657419534), Plume has established itself as*the*home for tokenized assets by combining rapid ecosystem growth with institutional credibility and regulatory progress.
* **RWA Leadership:**Plume ended the quarter with $645M in RWA TVL, 280K holders, and[100M+ onchain transactions](https://x.com/plumenetwork/status/1971640537565614459), maintaining its position as the #1 blockchain globally for RWA holders, and representing over 50% of the entire market. Today, Plume has*more RWA holders than the next 10 chains combined*, beating legacy industry titans like Ethereum, Solana, Avalanche, and Stellar.
* **Institutional Adoption:**Major partners including[Apollo Global](https://www.coindesk.com/business/2025/09/16/blockchain-based-rwa-specialists-bring-usd50m-to-apollo-s-tokenized-credit-strategy),[EY](https://plume.org/blog/nightfall-comes-to-plume-privacy-meets-scale-for-institutional-rwas),[Mastercard](https://plume.org/blog/mastercard-welcome-plume-to-start-path-program), and[Ant Group (TopNod)](https://x.com/Top_nod/status/1972919907470987276)launched or expanded programs on Plume last quarter.[Grove deployed $50M](https://www.coindesk.com/business/2025/09/16/blockchain-based-rwa-specialists-bring-usd50m-to-apollo-s-tokenized-credit-strategy)of onchain private credit as part of the Apollo launch, EY selected Plume for its[privacy-focused Nightfall L3](https://plume.org/blog/nightfall-comes-to-plume-privacy-meets-scale-for-institutional-rwas), and[Ant Group](https://x.com/Top_nod/status/1972919907470987276)both announced strategic integrations to expand global payments and user access. Plume was also one of five companies selected by[Mastercard](https://plume.org/blog/mastercard-welcome-plume-to-start-path-program)to join its engagement program to provide global support for fintechs.
* **Regulatory Breakthrough:**Plume received[SEC approval as a registered Transfer Agent](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/10/06/plume-network-registered-by-sec-as-transfer-agent-for-tokenized-securities), one of the first blockchain-native entities to hold this designation. It’s a foundational step toward enabling compliant, large-scale tokenization of TradFi markets.
* **Strategic Expansion:**The acquisition of[Dinero](https://www.coindesk.com/business/2025/10/08/rwa-chain-plume-acquiring-dinero-to-expand-institutional-defi-yield-offering), a leading institutional staking platform with $200M+ in staked ETH at its peak. This acquisition expands Plume’s product suite, and accelerates the development of our institutional DeFi product line on Nest.
* **Ecosystem Growth:**Over 85 dApps are now live on mainnet, including tokenized funds, commodities, credit instruments, and alternative assets. From gold and private credit to mineral interests and infrastructure projects, it’s all on Plume today.
* **Exchange Accessibility:**$PLUME token distribution continues to expand, with new listings on[Binance](https://plume.org/blog/binance)– the largest exchange in the world –along with[Upbit](https://plume.org/blog/upbit-listing-expands-south-korean-coverage-for-plume)and the[PancakeSwap DEX](https://x.com/PancakeSwap/status/1981534625903366171). This exp

editorial.headline: WisdomTree and Plume Bring Institutional Yield to Solana with 'Nest' Vaults
editorial.standfirst: The $140B asset manager taps Plume Network to deploy tokenized treasuries and credit as composable DeFi primitives. The move signals a shift from 'synthetic yield' to verifiable onchain economics.
key_takeaways: 5 New Vaults: Plume launches nWISDOM, nTBILL, and others on Solana, backed by WisdomTree and Hamilton Lane assets.
DeFi Native: Tokens are composable with Loopscale (lending) and Squads (treasury), offering 24/7 liquidity.
The 'Yieldcoin' Era: Plume positions RWA-backed tokens as the successor to stablecoins for holding onchain value.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
At Solana Breakpoint 2025 in Abu Dhabi, the narrative for Real World Assets (RWAs) shifted from mere experimentation to composable utility. **Plume Network**, a modular L2 specialized for RWAs, announced the deployment of five institutional-grade 'Nest' vaults on Solana. The launch integrates assets from heavyweights like **WisdomTree** ($140B AUM), **Hamilton Lane**, and **BlackOpal**, effectively turning private credit and U.S. Treasuries into liquid Solana primitives.

The mechanics are designed to bridge the gap between traditional finance (TradFi) rigidity and DeFi speed. Through Plume’s 'Distribution Layer,' Solana users can deposit stablecoins into vaults such as **nWISDOM** (WisdomTree) or **nTBILL** to receive yield-bearing tokens. Unlike traditional T+1 settlement cycles, these vaults offer 24/7 redemption and immediate utility within the Solana ecosystem. Integrations with **Loopscale** for lending markets and **Squads** for treasury management ensure these assets act as productive collateral rather than idle holdings.

Shukyee Ma, Chief Strategy Officer at Plume, framed this as the dawn of the "Yieldcoin" era. While stablecoins succeeded in bringing liquidity onchain, Plume argues that yield-bearing tokens backed by real economic activity—not inflationary token emissions—are required to retain capital. "Crypto is moving past the era of synthetic yield," Ma noted, emphasizing that verifiable cash flows from private credit and treasuries provide the stability institutional investors demand.

For **WisdomTree**, this integration represents a pragmatic evolution of their multi-chain strategy. Maredith Hannon, Head of Business Development for Digital Assets at WisdomTree, highlighted the necessity of "meeting investors where they are." By leveraging Solana as an execution layer, the asset manager bypasses the friction of traditional brokerage accounts, delivering institutional products directly to non-custodial wallets. This partnership signals that the next phase of institutional adoption will focus less on permissioned silos and more on open, composable infrastructure.
